mechanism_narrative: Rising policy rates increase discount rates and reduce equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rising rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions that compress consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in triggered periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based demand expansion that lifts corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in joint expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply chain normalization, which supports corporate margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above the 250 index threshold forces market pricing of prolonged restrictive monetary policy, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in high-inflation periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained quarterly growth in real GDP signals expanding aggregate demand that directly boosts corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expanding GDP periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent job creation and stable unemployment indicate a resilient labor market that sustains wage growth without triggering inflationary spirals, supporting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing permits below 1100 units signals collapsing construction demand and weakening consumer confidence, which transmits to broader equity markets and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in triggered periods are not significantly lower than baseline.
